name: RFdiffusion Protein Design
description: Design a new protein using RFdiffusion and score it for various properties. Design a binder to a target, scaffold an existing motif, or diversify your protein to generate variants. Score for properties like thermostability, solubilty, and binding affinity.
capabilities: Design a new protein using RFdiffusion and score it for various properties
Design a binder to a target, scaffold an existing motif, or diversify your protein to generate variants
Score for properties like thermostability, solubilty, and binding affinity

pdbFile.description: Input protein structure in PDB format

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein

binderLength.description: Length or length range of the designed binder

hotspots.description: Target residues to focus design on

scoreProperties.description: Score designs for thermostability, solubility, and binding affinity
